name: rvnl-project-intelligence
description: RVNL Project Intelligence — rates, guidelines, drawing compliance & multi-contract knowledge (full-stack with RAG)

scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,CLIENT -c cyan,magenta "npm run server" "npm run client"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
